message:
fix: Complete AST traversal in mutation_analyzer.zig

Add missing orelse_body handlers for for/while loops and match_stmt
handlers in AST traversal functions:

- collectMutations: add for_stmt/while_stmt orelse_body, match_stmt
- collectClosureAppends: add for_stmt/while_stmt orelse_body, match_stmt
- findAppendToCapture: add for_stmt/while_stmt orelse_body, try_stmt,
  with_stmt, match_stmt
- collectCallSites: add for_stmt/while_stmt orelse_body, match_stmt

This ensures complete AST traversal for Python code that uses
while/else, for/else constructs and match statements.
